title: Sandra Mcnichols
compiled_truth: Sandra Mcnichols is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-20 to 2001-05-29), Sandra Mcnichols sent 25 and received 118 emails, totalling 143 interactions. Top correspondents: [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (25), [Leslie Smith](people/leslie-smith) (24), [Angela Barnett](people/angela-barnett) (24), [Judy Walters](people/judy-walters) (23), [Mark Thorne](people/mark-thorne) (23).
